SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstracOrganizer
Abstract Base Entity representing an Organizer in the MongoDB "Organizers" collection.
AbstracOrganizerDTO
Abstract Data Transfer Object representing the base structure for any Organizer entity.
AbstractOrganizerRepository
MongoDB Repository for the abstract base class AbstracOrganizer.
Address
Embedded Entity representing the User's hometown.
AddressDTO
Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing the User's hometown information.
Attendent
Embedded Entity representing a user attending an event.
AttendentDTO
Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a user attending an event.
AuthController
REST Controller handling authentication operations.
AuthResponseDTO
Data Transfer Object (DTO) for the authentication response.
AuthService
Service class handling authentication logic.
Event
Embedded Entity representing an event.
EventController
REST Controller handling operations specific to Event.
EventDTO
Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing the full details of an Event.
EventGraphRepository
 
EventNode
Neo4j Node entity representing an Event.
EventOrganization
Embedded entity representing a brief summary of an event managed by an organization.
EventOrganizationDTO
DTO representing a brief summary of an event managed by an organization.
EventRepository
MongoDB Repository for managing Event entities.
EventService
 
JWTAuthenticationFilter
Custom security filter that executes once per request.
JWTService
Service component responsible for JSON Web Token (JWT) management.
Location
Embedded Entity representing a GeoJSON location point.
LocationDTO
Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing geospatial coordinates.
LoginRequestDTO
Data Transfer Object (DTO) used for user authentication.
Mapper
Utility class for mapping objects between the Data Transfer Object (DTO) layer and the Persistence (Entity) layer.
Members
Embedded entity representing a member of an organization.
MembersDTO
DTO representing a member within an organization.
Organization
Entity representing an Organization (Company/Group).
OrganizationController
REST Controller handling operations specific to Organization.
OrganizationDTO
DTO representing an Organization (e.g., a company or a group).
OrganizationForLinking
Embedded entity representing a lightweight link to an Organization.
OrganizationForLinkingDTO
Lightweight DTO used for linking an organization to an individual organizer.
OrganizationRepository
MongoDB Repository for managing Organization entities.
OrganizationService
Service class handling complex business logic for Controllers.
Organizer
Entity representing an individual Organizer (Person).
OrganizerController
REST Controller handling operations specific to Organizers.
OrganizerDTO
DTO representing an individual Organizer.
OrganizerGraphRepository
Neo4j Repository for managing OrganizerNode entities.
OrganizerNode
Neo4j Node entity representing an Organizer.
OrganizerRepository
MongoDB Repository for managing Organizer entities.
OrganizerService
Service class handling complex business logic for Controllers.
Request
Embedded entity representing an organizer request to join an organization
RequestDTO
DTO representing a request to join an organization
Review
Embedded entity representing a review left by a user for an event.
ReviewDTO
Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a review left by a user for an event.
ReviewEvent
Embedded Entity representing a summary of an event review.
ReviewEventDTO
Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a summary of a review left by the user.
ReviewParameterDTO
Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a summary of an event's review.
ReviewRelationship
 
Roles
Utility class defining standard role constants for authorization.
SecurityConfig
Main Security Configuration for the application.
Statistics
Embedded entity containing analytics and statistics for an event.
StatisticsDTO
Data Transfer Object (DTO) containing analytics and statistics for an event.
TonightsCallApplication
 
TopicGraphRepository
Neo4j Repository for managing TopicNode entities.
TopicNode
Neo4j Node entity representing a Topic (Interest/Category).
User
MongoDB Entity representing a User.
UserController
REST Controller handling User operations.
UserDTO
Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a User in the system.
UserGraphRepository
Neo4j Repository for managing UserNode entities.
UserNode
Neo4j Node entity representing a User.
UserRepository
Repository interface for managing User entities in MongoDB.
UserService
